name: woodworking-plan
description: Woodworking Plan — mobile-first PWA repository of woodworking plans. Sprint 0: environment & architecture.

scripts.// postinstall: Prisma's client is generated code, not shipped in node_modules. Without this, any fresh install (local, CI, or Vercel) builds against a client that does not exist yet. Running it on postinstall means it can never be forgotten.

comment:overrides: postcss <8.5.10 has a moderate XSS advisory (CVE-2026-41305). Next.js still pins a vulnerable range, so npm reports 'no fix available'. Forcing the patched postcss resolves it. Remove this override once Next.js ships a version that depends on postcss >=8.5.10.
